QF.id: I Codes of Conduct and Investor Protection_19

answer.text: Receive fair treatment, get timely execution of orders, access their account details, and lodge complaints

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Key investor rights: fair treatment, timely execution, transparency, access to records, complaint redressal, and protection from broker default through IEPF and SGF. **The Trap:** Investors have rights but also responsibilities (understanding risks, paying margins on time). **Cross-Exam Context:** Investor rights are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Investors should actively exercise their right to verify trades and monitor margin utilization.
